name: Mario Rivera
abstract: Mario Rivera (July 22, 1939 - August 10, 2007) was a Latin jazz saxophonist from the Dominican Republic. Besides saxophone, Rivera played trumpet, flute, piano, vibraphone, congas, and drums.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: Tito Rodríguez decides to form another band, big, in 1962... He has Cachao, Victor Paz from Venezuela, Mario Rivera, Marcelito Valdés... I mean, he puts a band that’s insane, Tito Rodríguez does.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: James Moody
about_quotes.evidence: I remember something Dizzy said... Rivera. Rivera... FEMALE: Mario. Mario Rivera. Yeah... I enjoyed that. I was wonderful.
about_quotes.doc_title: James Moody — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: There are times when you have super sidemen like ... Mario Rivera ... you always found somebody to fit in with your band.
